title: A Review Of Q1 24 The Red Sea Living In A Vuca World
section_path: A Review Of Q1 24 The Red Sea Living In A Vuca World
section_path_text: A Review Of Q1 24 The Red Sea Living In A Vuca World
summary:
Main
As we close the first quarter of 2024, tensions in the Red Sea remain at fever pitch. On 6 March, 3 seafarers were killed in a missile attack on the MV True Confidence (50,448-dwt; built in 2011). The fatalities were the first in the ongoing assault on shipping by Yemen's Houthi rebels.
